name: folder2podcast
description: Convert audio folders to podcast feeds with HTTP server

scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:web
scripts.docker:build:all: npm run build:all && docker build -t folder2podcast:v2 -t folder2podcast:latest-v2 .
scripts.docker:stop: docker stop folder2podcast-test-v2 && docker rm folder2podcast-test-v2
scripts.docker:clean: npm run docker:stop 2>/dev/null || true && docker rmi folder2podcast:v2 folder2podcast:latest-v2 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.docker:mac: docker run -d --name folder2podcast-mac-v2 -p 3100:3100 -v $HOME/Desktop/audio_books:/podcasts -e PUID=$(id -u) -e PGID=$(id -g) -e PORT=3100 -e BASE_URL=http://localhost:3100 folder2podcast:v2
scripts.docker:mac:stop: docker stop folder2podcast-mac-v2 && docker rm folder2podcast-mac-v2
scripts.docker:compose:rebuild: docker-compose down && docker-compose build --no-cache && docker-compose up -d
